reviewer: weekly-hardening-routine (headless Chromium 141 via CDP; no chrome-devtools-mcp in cloud env)

interactive.rationale: Permission request + fire button verified; in headless the permission gate correctly blocked with an honest message and no fake notification.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported API, non-granted permission, and error event paths all present and labelled.

accessibility.rationale: role=log live region, native checkbox with label, keyboard verified.

summary: Real notification flow with the permission gate presented as the honest outcome.
